summary: Full backend + frontend e2e validation of CloneMe AI MVP. 33/33 backend tests pass (auth, clones, memories, public chat with Claude Sonnet 4.5, storage upload+serve, cascade delete). Frontend e2e flows pass: landing renders, register->dashboard, dashboard empty state, clone create via /clones/new, clone edit (personality/bio), memory add, public clone chat with live LLM reply, 404 page for unknown slug, login error on bad creds, login success, Google OAuth redirect to auth.emergentagent.com confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py line 14: JWT_SECRET default 'dev-secret' is fine for dev but should fail-fast in prod; consider raising if env unset in production.
clones.py line 31: clone limit hardcoded to 5 (comment says 'Limit free users to 1 clone' but code uses >=5). Comment is misleading.

chat.py: simple keyword retrieval scoring works for MVP but will fall back to importance-only ordering when no token overlap; consider deferring embeddings only after MVP (already noted in product choices).

storage.py line 18: module-level _storage_key cache is a simple global. Acceptable for single-process; document that for multi-worker deployments each worker holds its own key, which is fine since refresh-on-403 logic exists.
auth.py line 87 / clones.py /by-slug: returns 'visibility' field on public clones; verify no sensitive owner-only fields leak (currently only public clone meta + personality/memories — looks safe).
DELETE clone returns 200 — typically 204 No Content is more idiomatic; not a bug.

/api prefix is consistent across all routers; CORS allows '*' with allow_credentials=True which is technically incompatible with browsers when using cookies, but works because frontend is same-origin via ingress and Bearer header fallback exists.
models.py CloneCreate: 'visibility' Literal includes 'unlisted' but spec mentions only public/private. This is a minor product decision flag, not a bug.
test_credentials: /app/memory/test_credentials.md present and valid; tests created fresh users e2e_<ts>@example.com / TestPass123!
seed_data_creation: Each test run creates ephemeral users + clone + memory + conversation. Cleanup test (TestZCleanup) deletes the primary clone & verifies cascade (memories/messages/conversations gone). UI tests leave a few residual ephemeral users/clones (UI cleanup not exhaustive).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_cloneme_backend.py is the regression suite — run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_cloneme_backend.py -v. Uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from env. All 33 cases passed end-to-end including a live Claude Sonnet 4.5 chat. UI flows validated via Playwright covered: landing, register, dashboard empty + clone-card, clone create/edit, memory add, public chat with LLM reply rendered as message bubbles, 404 unknown slug, login error/success, Google OAuth redirect to auth.emergentagent.com (verified via source — Login.jsx line ~13: window.location.href = `https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=...`). Avatar upload tested at API level (image PUT to Emergent Object Storage + GET serve back). UI avatar upload not exercised via Playwright but data-testid avatar-file-input + avatar-upload-btn exist and the underlying API works.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All endpoints behave correctly: auth (register/login/me/logout) works with both cookie and Bearer header; clone CRUD enforces ownership; reserved slugs (api, login, dashboard, new, etc.) blocked; private clones return 403 to non-owners; chat returns sensible Claude-Sonnet-4.5 replies with persisted history (ascending order); memory CRUD enforces owner; storage upload and re-serve work via Emergent Object Storage.
